data.title: Polymarket's probability that "WTI crude oil will fall to $90 in April 2026" has risen to 89%, a 35% increase in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, the probability of Polymarket predicting that "WTI crude oil will fall to $90 in April 2026" has increased significantly, now reaching 89%, a 35% increase in the last 24 hours. As of now, the total trading volume of Polymarket's "WTI crude oil April 2026 price" event contract has exceeded $16.859 million. The rules for this event contract are: if the "highest price" of any 1-minute candlestick chart for the most active month of WTI crude oil futures during April 2026 is equal to or higher than the listing price, the market will determine it as "yes"; otherwise, the market will determine it as "no." Previously, the rules for the WTI crude oil March price prediction event contract were: if the official settlement price of the current most active month (near-month) of the CME crude oil futures contract on any trading day is equal to or higher than the listing price up to the last trading day of March 2026, the market will determine it as "yes"; otherwise, the market will determine it as "no." According to Gate data, WTI crude oil is currently priced at $92.68, down 16.01% in the last 24 hours. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Jack Yi: Crypto Investors Fall Into Three Groups as Long-Term Bitcoin Holders Often Outperform
data.description: Key TakeawaysJack Yi divides crypto investors into three main categories.Traditional finance investors with low trading activity often outperform over time.Sector-focused specialists build defensible edge and steady returns.Long-term Bitcoin allocation can grow significantly without active trading.Jack Yi Outlines Three Types of Crypto InvestorsJack Yi said crypto market participants generally fall into three distinct groups, based on his experience across multiple market cycles.Speaking during a Binance Square livestream, Yi highlighted differences in strategy, discipline, and long-term performance among investor types.Institutional Crypto VCs Face Sustainability ChallengesThe first group consists of institutional-style crypto venture capital firms.While these investors often present:Structured frameworksDetailed researchProfessional positioningYi noted that many struggle when broader market trends weaken, lacking consistent and repeatable profit models. As a result, they face significant pressure during downturns.Specialist Investors Build Stronger MoatsThe second group focuses on specific sectors or niches within crypto.These investors:Develop deep domain expertiseBuild competitive advantagesGenerate more stable cash flowsAccording to Yi, this approach tends to offer more resilience across cycles compared to broader, less focused strategies.Traditional Investors Often Deliver the Best OutcomesThe third group—traditional finance investors—often achieves the most consistent results.Yi said these investors typically:Stay within their circle of competenceAvoid excessive trading and hype-driven strategiesFocus on long-term allocation to core assetsThis disciplined approach reduces risk and allows compounding to work over time.Bitcoin Allocation Example Highlights Long-Term StrategyYi shared a case from 2018, when he advised a traditional investor to allocate around 5% of their portfolio to Bitcoin.The investor:Held the position long termAvoided trading altcoinsMaintained a passive strategyOver time, the Bitcoin allocation grew significantly as a share of the overall portfolio, demonstrating the impact of long-term holding in a high-growth asset.Discipline Over ActivityYi’s framework underscores a broader takeaway for crypto markets:Active trading and short-term strategies often struggle across cyclesSpecialized expertise can offer steady performanceLong-term, low-turnover strategies may deliver superior outcomesThe analysis highlights a shift toward discipline, selectivity, and long-term positioning as key drivers of success in a maturing crypto market.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 72,000 USDT with a 5.27% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 08, 2026, 12:57 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 72,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 72,047.0625 USDT, with a narrowed 5.27% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Jack Yi: AI Shift Accelerating, Firms That Fail to Adapt Risk Being Phased Out
data.description: Key TakeawaysJack Yi warns AI adoption is becoming critical for survival.Says individuals and companies that don’t understand AI may be phased out.Has shifted personal focus toward AI learning over the past 2–3 months.Portfolio company saw significant growth outlook improvement after AI pivot.Jack Yi Highlights Urgency of AI AdoptionJack Yi said the rapid pace of artificial intelligence development is reshaping both individual careers and company strategies.Speaking during a Binance Square livestream, Yi noted that recent advancements in AI have been “deeply striking,” prompting him to dedicate significant time over the past two to three months to understanding the technology.AI Becoming a Competitive RequirementYi emphasized that AI is no longer optional.According to him:Individuals who do not understand or use AI tools risk becoming obsoleteCompanies that fail to integrate AI may lose competitivenessIndustry standards are shifting rapidly toward AI-driven efficiencyHe added that he has been actively encouraging companies within his investment portfolio to accelerate their AI transition.Real-World Impact Seen in Portfolio CompanyYi shared an example from one of his portfolio companies, which had operated in traditional software services for years.After pivoting toward AI:The company experienced a significant shift in growth expectationsInternal sentiment improved markedlyThe team described the new AI initiative as potentially transformativeHe noted that the team jokingly suggested the project alone could be “enough to retire,” underscoring the scale of perceived opportunity.AI Reshaping Industry EconomicsThe remarks reflect a broader trend across technology and digital asset markets, where AI is rapidly becoming a core driver of value creation.Key implications include:Increased productivity and cost efficiencyNew business models and revenue streamsCompetitive pressure on legacy software and servicesAI Integration as a Survival StrategyYi’s comments reinforce the growing consensus that AI adoption is becoming a baseline requirement.For both individuals and companies, the message is clear:Adapt to AI or risk falling behindEarly adoption may unlock disproportionate advantagesDelayed integration could lead to structural declineAs AI continues to evolve, its integration into business and investment strategies is likely to accelerate, reshaping competitive dynamics across industries.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Global Gold ETF Outflows Reach Record Levels in March
data.description: In April, the World Gold Council reported that global gold ETFs experienced a record outflow of $12 billion in March. According to Jin10, this significant outflow halved the first quarter's inflow to $12 billion and ended North America's nine-month streak of inflows. Despite this trend, Asia saw strong inflows, achieving a record quarterly growth that helped maintain the overall inflow trend for the first quarter. Despite the sell-off, global gold holdings increased by 62 tons in the first quarter, and liquidity in the gold market remained robust, with trading volumes rising across major venues.

data.title: South Korea tightens rules on cryptocurrency withdrawal delay exemptions to combat telecom fraud.
data.description: South Korea's Financial Services Commission (FSC) announced it will tighten exemption rules for cryptocurrency exchange withdrawal delay systems. The FSC pointed out that previously, exchanges set their own exemption standards without a unified minimum requirement, allowing criminals to quickly transfer funds by meeting simple conditions such as account age or trading history. The FSC, in conjunction with the Financial Supervisory Service (FSS) and the Digital Asset Exchange Alliance (DAXA), has developed a unified framework requiring exchanges to comprehensively consider factors such as trading frequency, account history, and deposit/withdrawal amounts when assessing whether users qualify for exemptions. Between June and September 2025, accounts granted withdrawal delay exemptions accounted for 59% of fraudulent accounts on cryptocurrency exchanges, representing 75.5% of related losses. The FSC stated that simulation tests show the proportion of users eligible for exemptions will drop to approximately 1% under the new rules. The FSC will also strengthen oversight of exempted users through regular audits, verification of fund sources, and monitoring of suspicious withdrawal activities. Furthermore, on Tuesday, the FSC required exchanges to reconcile their internal ledgers with actual asset holdings every five minutes, a directive related to an internal control review concerning the Bithumb Bitcoin payment error incident.

data.title: U.S. Claims Decisive Military Victory in Iran, Ceasefire Agreement Reached
data.description:
U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced on April 8 that the United States has achieved a decisive military victory in Iran. According to BlockBeats, Iran had sought a ceasefire agreement following the U.S. launching 800 airstrikes on Tuesday night, which destroyed Iran's defense industry infrastructure. As a result, Iran is no longer capable of producing missiles, rockets, or drones. The ceasefire signifies that Iran will never possess nuclear weapons.

The U.S. has accomplished its military objectives in Iran, and the ceasefire is described as a pause, with coalition forces ready to resume operations if necessary. The U.S. hopes Iran will choose lasting peace. All parties have agreed to open the Strait of Hormuz, allowing ships to pass through, and warships will "navigate" the strait. The ceasefire agreement will take some time to come into effect.

data.title: The US dollar index (DXY) fell 1%, erasing all gains since 2026.
data.description: According to Gate data, the US dollar index (DXY) fell 1%, erasing all gains since 2026. (Jinshi)

data.title: Jack Yi Warns Crypto Pullback May Deepen Amid Fed, Geopolitical and Cycle Pressures
data.description: Key TakeawaysJack Yi cites Fed policy, geopolitics, and cycle effects as key downside drivers.Warns current correction could be deeper than initially expected.Highlights fading expectations around rate cuts and crypto policy support.Maintains long-term bullish view on Ethereum despite short-term volatility.Macro and Policy Pressures Weigh on Crypto OutlookDuring his Binance Square AMA, Jack Yi warned that current market weakness is being driven by a combination of macroeconomic and structural factors.Speaking in a Binance Square AMA, Yi pointed to unmet expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts, escalating Middle East tensions, and delays in crypto regulatory reforms as key headwinds for the market.He also noted that previously anticipated catalysts, including discussions around a potential U.S. “national Bitcoin strategy,” have failed to materialize, reducing bullish momentum.Cycle Dynamics Suggest Deeper Correction RiskYi emphasized that the current downturn is not solely macro-driven but also tied to the crypto market’s cyclical nature.According to him, the ongoing correction could extend further than originally expected when factoring in:The four-year market cycleReduced liquidity expectationsWeakening sentimentThis combination increases the likelihood of a more prolonged or deeper pullback phase.Ethereum Outlook Remains Structurally BullishDespite short-term pressure, Yi said his long-term outlook on Ethereum remains unchanged.He attributed recent volatility primarily to external macro conditions rather than a deterioration in Ethereum’s fundamentals.Short-Term Volatility Driven by Broader Financial ConditionsYi added that current market swings are being amplified by broader financial market dynamics, including:Higher-for-longer interest rate expectationsRising geopolitical riskShifting investor positioningThese factors are contributing to heightened volatility across both crypto and traditional markets.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Proposes Enhanced Child Protection Measures in AI Era
data.description: OpenAI has unveiled a policy blueprint designed to bolster the U.S. child protection framework amidst advancements in artificial intelligence. According to NS3.AI, the blueprint focuses on addressing AI-generated or manipulated child sexual abuse material, enhancing reporting and coordination among service providers, and implementing safety-by-design measures in AI systems. These initiatives aim to safeguard children in the digital age by ensuring that AI technologies are developed and utilized responsibly.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's Key Oil Pipeline Attacked
data.description: A crucial east-west oil pipeline in Saudi Arabia, which connects the Gulf region to the Red Sea and facilitates the export of crude oil, was attacked at 1 p.m. local time. According to Odaily, the incident was reported by the Financial Times. The pipeline is vital for transporting oil to overseas markets.

data.title: Oil Price Drop Impacts Leveraged Futures Positions
data.description: Brent crude oil prices have fallen below $90 per barrel, leading to significant losses in leveraged futures positions. According to Odaily, Hyperbot data indicates that Sky co-founder Rune's 20x leveraged WTI crude oil futures and 7x leveraged Brent oil futures are now in the red. Additionally, his 7x leveraged Nasdaq 100 short position and 20x leveraged S&P 500 short position are also experiencing losses. The overall value of these positions has decreased to approximately $3.952 million, with unrealized losses exceeding $610,000.

data.title: Aster: Launches BAY Perpetual Contracts and introduces a $50,000 reward pool.
data.description: Aster announced on its X platform that it will launch BAY perpetual contracts and introduce a $50,000 ASTER reward pool. BAYUSDT perpetual contracts will launch at 12:00 UTC on April 8th, and the related activities will last until 14:00 on April 15th. During the event, BAYUSDT perpetual contracts will receive a 1.2x bonus. Rewards will be distributed based on the user's trading fees in BAYUSDT perpetual contracts, with a maximum of 3% per user. Users must accumulate more than $5 in trading fees to qualify; rewards below 1 ASTER will not be awarded, and fraudulent trading and manipulation will result in disqualification.

data.title: Qatar Resumes Production at LNG Export Facilities
data.description: Qatar has initiated efforts to restart production at its liquefied natural gas (LNG) export facilities. According to Odaily, this move comes as part of the country's strategy to enhance its energy export capabilities. The resumption of operations is expected to bolster Qatar's position in the global LNG market.

data.title: Sky Partners' Rune's two long positions in crude oil have turned from profitable to losing, with the overall position now showing a floating loss of over $610,000.
data.description: With Brent crude oil falling below $90 per barrel, Hyperbot data monitoring shows that Rune, co-founder of Sky (formerly MakerDAO), has seen his 20x leveraged long positions in WTI crude oil futures (CL) and 7x leveraged long positions in Brent crude oil futures turn to losses. In addition, his 7x leveraged short positions in the Nasdaq 100 and 20x leveraged short positions in the S&P 500 are also in a loss-making state. His total position value has now fallen to about $3.952 million, with a floating loss of over $610,000.

data.title: Liquid Capital Founder Jack Yi: Long-Term Bullish on Crypto but Warns on Volatility and Cycles
data.description: Key TakeawaysJack Yi remains long-term bullish on crypto markets.Comments made during a Binance Square AMA livestream.Emphasizes importance of respecting market cycles and extreme volatility.Experience spans multiple bull and bear cycles since 2015.Veteran Investor Shares Outlook in Binance Square AMAJack Yi, founder of Liquid Capital, reiterated a long-term bullish stance on crypto during a Binance Square AMA livestream.Yi noted that he entered the market in late 2015 and has since navigated multiple bull and bear cycles.Long-Term Bullish Trend Remains IntactAccording to Yi, maintaining a long-term bullish view has historically been the more effective strategy in crypto.Despite repeated downturns, the market has continued to trend upward over time, supported by growing adoption and expanding institutional participation.Warning Against Over-OptimismHowever, Yi cautioned against excessive optimism.He stressed that investors must remain aware of:Cyclical market behaviorSharp drawdownsHigh volatility environmentsIgnoring these factors, he said, can lead to significant losses during market corrections.

data.title: Pharos Secures $44 Million in Series A Funding to Enhance RWA Infrastructure
data.description: Layer 1 network Pharos has announced the completion of a $44 million Series A funding round on April 8. According to BlockBeats, the round was led by several undisclosed major institutions, including an Asian private equity fund, a new energy public company, and a Hong Kong-compliant financial institution. The funds will be used to accelerate the development of on-chain real-world asset (RWA) infrastructure across Asia and globally.

data.title: Crypto Market Rebound Boosts Huang Licheng's Leveraged Positions
data.description:
Hyperbot data reveals that Huang Licheng has opened a 10x leveraged long position in HYPE, currently holding 28,888 HYPE tokens. According to Odaily, he has also incrementally increased his 25x leveraged long position in Ethereum, now holding 10,925 ETH with a liquidation price of $2,066.

As the cryptocurrency market rebounds, Huang Licheng's overall positions have shifted from loss to profit, with a total value reaching approximately $25.651 million and a floating profit of around $1.1 million.

data.title: Qatar begins work to resume production at its liquefied natural gas export plants.
data.description: Market news: Qatar has begun work to resume production at its liquefied natural gas (LNG) export plants. (Jinshi)

data.title: Cryptocurrency Fraud Losses Rise to $11.366 Billion in 2025, FBI Reports
data.description: The FBI has reported a significant increase in cryptocurrency-related fraud losses, with its Internet Crime Complaint Center recording $11.366 billion in losses for 2025. According to NS3.AI, this marks a 22% rise compared to the previous year. Individuals aged 60 and older experienced the highest losses, totaling $4.43 billion. Cryptocurrency investment fraud continues to be the largest scam category, accounting for $7.228 billion of the total losses.
